title: Localisation and translation
description: We carefully carry meaning from one language to another. When needed, we adapt the text with cultural and audience context in mind.
All types of content are welcome: from banners to literary books, from interfaces to guidelines.
deliverable: A handmade translation, cultural adaptation or a custom AI system with working prompts and guidelines.
price: AI systems, adaptations: €80/h · Literary translations: TBD
